nodes.name: Lilac-crowned fruit dove
nodes.summary: Lilac-crowned fruit dove（Ptilinopus rarotongensis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Lilac-crowned fruit dove。

nodes.name: Lilac-crowned fruit dove
nodes.summary: The lilac-crowned fruit dove (Ptilinopus rarotongensis), also known as the Rarotonga fruit-dove or Cook Islands fruit-dove, is one of over 50 species of Ptilinopus (the fruit doves or fruit pigeons). Taxonomy and systematics The lilac-crowned fruit dove occurs in the Cook Islands and is split into two subspecies. Ptilinopus rarotongensis rarotongensis – occurs on Rarotonga Ptilinopus rarotongensis goodwini – occurs on Atiu Status Due to the lilac-crowned fruit dove occurring only on two small islands now, they are at risk from sudden storms. The population is seen as stable, but is no larger than 2,500 individuals. The IUCN categorized the dove as "Near Threatened" as of 2021. References
